description: A sensor is a farm asset that detects and reports a measured condition, optionally providing data streams.
probe_semantics: Instantiate a sensor asset via the sensor given-step write surface and read it back from the active set.

punts: NEW WRITE SURFACE: sensor assets birth through a sensor given-step (the plant_type house form), carrying its bundle fields (sensor_data_stream, sensor_private_key, publicly_readable) only when stated; VALIDATED LIVE (POST /api/asset/sensor 201 after farm_sensor enabled on the oracle — module enabled 2026-07-23, documented in bring-up.sh)

STANDING-POLICY DECISION (BIND-WITH-FEATURE): treated as BIND-WITH-FEATURE(sensor) under Duke's standing policy 'identity terms bind DURING their feature's port' (term-dispositions-2026-07-22.md) without a fresh per-term elicitation. Reversal condition: Duke may re-disposition at the next wave boundary; an unbound or retired term costs only its spec.
proposed by openai:gpt-5.6-terra (propose-terms); PROVISIONAL until first_pack_seal is filled by a real sealed recording
